name: SPECTRAL CAPITAL Corp
summary: Spectral Capital Corporation is a publicly traded Nevada technology company operating as a hybrid research, intellectual property, and operating business. It owns and operates telecommunications subsidiaries 42 Telecom Ltd. and Telvantis Voice Services, Inc., which provide telecommunications infrastructure, enterprise messaging, routing, and analytics services. The company also develops proprietary software, AI, and data processing intellectual property, with over 500 patentable innovations, and pursues selective acquisitions of technology-enabled businesses.

products.name: Vogon Cloud
products.description: Flagship cloud platform incorporating DQ-LDB ledger technology and QuantumVM middleware for hybrid classical/quantum computing workloads.

products.name: DQ-LDB Ledger Technology
products.description: Proprietary secure, immutable distributed ledger for data storage developed via Node Nexus acquisition.

products.name: QuantumVM
products.description: Middleware for integrating classical and quantum computing workloads.

products.name: Noot
products.description: Mobile search engine and mobile sharing technology acquired via Fiveseas Securities Ltd.

products.name: Monitr
products.description: Application enhancing discovery, analysis, and sharing of financial news and topics on the web.

products.name: Telecommunications Infrastructure Services
products.description: Enterprise messaging, routing, analytics, and telecom infrastructure services provided across multiple jurisdictions.

partnerships.description: Sold mobile search and sharing technology to Spectral; holds 40% of Noot Holdings and right of first refusal on technology sale.
Sold financial news technology to Spectral; holds 40% of Monitr Holdings and right of first refusal on technology sale.
